subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Spot whose remembrance is sanctified above all mention and whose description transcendeth all praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک فی مقر قد کان ذکره مقدسا عن الاذکار و وصفه مقدسا عن الاوصاف و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
